name: Chicken with Cashews and Snow Peas
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut the chicken into small, bite-sized pieces.
2. In a small bowl, combine the crushed garlic, minced ginger, sesame oil, and soy sauce (tamari).
3. Stir the chicken into this marinade; set aside to marinate.
4. Remove the stem ends from the snow peas.
5. Heat the oil in a wok or large skillet. When hot, add the cashews; cook for just a couple of minutes until golden; using a slotted spoon, remove and set aside.
6. Stir-fry the snow peas in the hot oil for about two minutes, until bright green. Add to the serving dish with the cashews.
7. Stir-fry the marinated chicken in the oil for about 5 minutes, until opaque throughout.
8. Dissolve the cornstarch in the chicken broth (or water) and add to the pan along with the snow peas and cashews. Cook, stirring, just until thickened and hot through.
